MBA In Finance and Control (MFC)

    •

Welcome to the School of Management at Tribhuvan University (SOMTU), a premier institution dedicated to fostering excellence in management education. With a strong emphasis on student-centered learning, international perspectives, and industry alignment, SOMTU stands out as a top business school in Nepal. Established in 2012 as an autonomous institution under the esteemed Faculty of Management, Tribhuvan University, SOMTU has consistently delivered high-quality education to nurture holistic, socially responsible, and capable professionals. Our mission is to develop individuals who not only meet the demands of today's organizations but also possess the entrepreneurial mindset to create and grow their own ventures. 

At SOMTU, we believe in providing our students with a comprehensive learning experience that extends beyond the confines of the classroom. Through a diverse range of learning methods, including field immersion, industry visits, interactions with industry experts, participation in seminars, and engaging case studies, we ensure that our students are well-equipped to succeed as they transition from campus to the next stage of their careers.

 

The MBA program is implemented by the autonomous School of Management (SOM) on a full-time basis. The pr...

MBA Admission 2017

The school of management at Tribhuvan University (SOMTU) invites applications for admission to the MBA program for the 2017 fall session. The SOMTU MBA is Designed as an intensive full-time, Two -Year course spread over four semesters, which consists course works, seminars, practicums, experiential learning and research project.

Key features World-wide recognized program; well appreciated by the corporate sector; state-of-the-art course structure; greater choice of elective courses; real-life business exposure; highly qualified and experienced professors; innovative pedagogic strategies; and inspirational academic environment.

Eligibility A student completed at least 15 years of formal education (12 years of schooling plus 3 years of bachelor level) with a minimum CGPA of 2.0 or 45 percent at bachelor level from the Universities recognized by Tribhuvan University can apply. Students who have completed bachelor level education but is waiting for final results may apply.

Key Dates
• Applications: June 12,2017-July 6, 2017(10:00am -3:00pm)
• Written Entrance Test (SOMAT): July 8, 2017(at 11:00am)
-Verbal Ability - Issue-based Essay Writing
- Quantitative Ability - Case Analysis
• Group Discussion and Individual Presentation: July 11 and 12, 2017
• Personal Interview: July 14, 2017
• Admission: July 16 - July 21, 2017

For Detailed Information
Contact Office of the School of Management
New Management Building, Kirtipur,
Kathmandu, Ph.: (1) 977-1-5907928/4332719
Email:[email protected], Url: www.somtu.edu.np
